field.value: Requirements for creation, maintenance, and disposition of federal records

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Provides a comprehensive framework for ensuring the effectiveness of information security controls over information resources that support Federal operations and assets

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Establishes a code of fair information practices governing the collection, maintenance, use, and dissemination of personally identifiable information

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Promotes the use of information technology in the Federal Government to enhance citizen access to Government information and services

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Improves the productivity, efficiency, and effectiveness of Federal programs by improving the way the Federal Government acquires, uses, and disposes of information technology

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Establishes the responsibilities of federal agencies for creating, maintaining, and preserving records

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Provides the public the right to request access to records from any federal agency

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Controlled Unclassified Information - establishes an open and uniform program for managing information that requires safeguarding or dissemination controls

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Improving the Nation's Cybersecurity - enhances software supply chain security and incident response capabilities

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Managing Information as a Strategic Resource - establishes general policy for the management of Federal information resources

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Specifies the budget, expenditures, and policies of the U.S. Department of Defense including procurement and personnel matters

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Directs the Office of Management and Budget to issue government-wide guidelines that provide policy and procedural guidance to federal agencies for ensuring and maximizing the quality of information disseminated

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Minimizes the paperwork burden for individuals, small businesses, and other entities resulting from the collection of information by or for the federal government

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Governs the process by which federal agencies develop and issue regulations, including requirements for notice, public comment, and judicial review

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Principal set of rules governing the acquisition process by which executive agencies acquire goods and services by contract

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Improves the financial management and reporting within the Federal Government by establishing Chief Financial Officers in major departments and agencies

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Main administrative building housing executive offices and HR department

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Implement zero trust security architecture across all IT systems and networks to enhance cybersecurity posture.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Reduced security incidents, enhanced threat detection, improved access controls

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Establish comprehensive data governance framework including data quality, privacy, and lifecycle management.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Improved data quality, regulatory compliance, enhanced data discovery and usage

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Comprehensive wellness program including mental health support, ergonomic improvements, and safety training.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Reduced workplace injuries, improved employee satisfaction, lower healthcare costs

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Develop and implement ethical AI guidelines, bias detection tools, and responsible AI governance processes.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Ethical AI deployment, reduced algorithmic bias, enhanced public trust

field.name: appbase_name
field.value: AI Ethics and Responsible AI Framework

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Migrate remaining legacy systems to hybrid cloud infrastructure with focus on scalability and cost optimization.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Reduced infrastructure costs, improved system performance, enhanced disaster recovery

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Initiative to increase procurement from diverse suppliers including small businesses and minority-owned enterprises.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: 30% increase in diverse supplier contracts, enhanced community relations

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Integrate privacy considerations into all system development and business processes from inception.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Enhanced privacy compliance, reduced data breach risk, improved customer trust

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Strengthen organizational resilience through enhanced BCP, disaster recovery, and crisis management capabilities.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Reduced recovery time, improved incident response, enhanced service continuity

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Comprehensive leadership development program for mid-level managers including coaching, mentoring, and training.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Improved leadership capabilities, enhanced succession planning, increased employee retention

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Comprehensive program to reduce carbon footprint, implement renewable energy, and achieve sustainability goals.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: 50% reduction in carbon emissions, renewable energy adoption, enhanced environmental compliance

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Modernize customer-facing systems and processes to deliver seamless digital experiences across all channels.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Improved customer satisfaction, reduced service costs, enhanced digital engagement

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Implement integrated risk management framework with advanced analytics and real-time risk monitoring.

field.name: appbase_expectedoutcomes
field.value: Improved risk visibility, proactive risk mitigation, enhanced decision-making

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Dell Latitude 5540 with standard enterprise configuration

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Dual HD monitor for workstation use

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Adjustable ergonomic task chair with lumbar support

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Locking lateral file cabinet for document storage

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Monochrome laser multifunction printer with duplex printing, scanning, copying, and fax capabilities

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Print speed: 40 ppm, Print resolution: 1200 x 1200 dpi, Paper capacity: 350 sheets, Connectivity: Ethernet, Wi-Fi, USB

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: 27-inch QHD IPS monitor with USB-C connectivity and built-in KVM switch

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Resolution: 2560 x 1440, Panel: IPS, Refresh rate: 60Hz, Ports: USB-C (90W), HDMI, DisplayPort

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Universal Thunderbolt 4 docking station with 100W power delivery

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Ports: 3x USB-C (Thunderbolt 4), 4x USB-A 3.2, 2x HDMI 2.0, 1x Ethernet (2.5Gb), Audio in/out, 100W power delivery

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Wireless illuminated keyboard with smart backlighting and multi-device connectivity

field.name: appbase_name
field.value: Logitech MX Keys Advanced Wireless Keyboard

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Connection: Bluetooth, USB receiver, Backlit: Yes (proximity sensor), Battery: rechargeable (10 days), Compatible: Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, iOS

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Advanced wireless mouse with silent clicks and electromagnetic scrolling

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Sensor: 8000 DPI, Buttons: 7 programmable, Battery: 70 days, Connectivity: Bluetooth, USB receiver, Compatible: Windows, Mac, Linux

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Ergonomic office chair with 4D adjustable arms and lumbar support

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Adjustments: Height, arms (4D), lumbar, recline tension, Weight capacity: 300 lbs, Warranty: 12 years

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Electric height-adjustable standing desk with programmable presets

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Dimensions: 60W x 30D, Height range: 25.5-50.5 inches, Motor: Dual, Load capacity: 200 lbs, Presets: 4 memory positions

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Rack-mountable uninterruptible power supply with LCD display

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Capacity: 1500VA / 1000W, Runtime: 23 min at 50% load, Outlets: 8x IEC C13, Form factor: 2U rack-mount, Communication: USB, network card slot

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Cross-cut paper shredder with jam protection and SafeSense technology

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Security level: P-4, Cut size: 5/32 x 1-1/2 inches, Capacity: 16 sheets, Bin: 6 gallons, Features: 100% jam proof, SafeSense, silent operation

field.name: appbase_description
field.value: Adjustable in-line document holder for reducing neck strain

field.name: appbase_specifications
field.value: Capacity: 150 sheets, Adjustments: Height, angle, line guide, Easel width: 12.5 inches, Compatibility: Monitor-mounted or desk stand
